What We Do

Film It.
Shoot It.

Christian Ray Media specializes in both videography and photography — delivering cinematic films and stunning stills for luxury real estate and performance automobiles.

01 — Automotive

Dealership &
Showroom

Polished showroom sessions that make every vehicle irresistible. We work with dealerships to produce content that drives sales and elevates brand presence.

›
02 — Automotive

Motion &
Machines

Rolling shots and still photography that reveal every curve and ounce of power. From exotic dealerships to private collections — video and photos that sell.

›
03 — Photo & Video

Up Close &
Personal

Macro detail work that captures the craftsmanship — every vent, curve, and carbon fiber weave.

›
04 — Brand Films

Social & Campaign
Content

Platform-optimized video reels and photo sets for Instagram, TikTok, and beyond. Content that stops the scroll.

How We Work

The Process

01
◈

Discovery

We study your property or vehicle, understand the narrative, and scout angles that reveal its truest character.

02
◉

Pre-Production

Shot lists, lighting plans, drone clearances, golden hour scheduling. Every detail prepared before we arrive.

03
▣

The Shoot

A professional crew with cinema-grade equipment. Unobtrusive, fast, and obsessively detail-oriented.

04
◈

Delivery

Color graded, scored, and delivered in all formats within 5 business days. Ready to publish anywhere.

"

The video and photos Christian produced for our listing were world-class. Buyers were calling within 24 hours. His work doesn't just show a property — it sells a lifestyle.

— JAMES HARTWELL
Principal Broker, Hartwell Estates Group
Investment

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Every package is designed to deliver maximum impact. Choose what fits your project — or reach out for a custom quote.

Essential

  • 25–35 professionally edited listing photos
  • Interior + exterior coverage
  • Vertical social reel (15–30 sec)
  • 1 revision included
  • Delivery within 48 hours
